mapper.select: select p2.ck_streamer as partner_no, s.streamer_name as partner_name, s.streamer_soop_id as partner_soop_id, count(*) as play_count, sum(case when c.ck_winner = p1.ck_side then 1 else 0 end) as win_count, sum(case when c.ck_winner != p1.ck_side then 1 else 0 end) as lose_count from ck_participant p1 join ck_participant p2 on p1.ck_id = p2.ck_id and p1.ck_side = p2.ck_side and p1.ck_streamer != p2.ck_streamer join ck c on p1.ck_id = c.ck_id join streamer s on p2.ck_streamer = s.streamer_no where p1.ck_streamer = #{streamerNo} group by p2.ck_streamer, s.streamer_name, s.streamer_soop_id order by play_count desc, win_count desc, partner_name asc

select tm2.streamer_no as partner_no, s.streamer_name as partner_name, s.streamer_soop_id as partner_soop_id, count(*) as play_count from team_member tm1 join team_member tm2 on tm1.team_id = tm2.team_id and tm1.streamer_no != tm2.streamer_no join streamer s on tm2.streamer_no = s.streamer_no where tm1.streamer_no = #{streamerNo} group by tm2.streamer_no, s.streamer_name, s.streamer_soop_id order by play_count desc, partner_name asc
